fault_hypothesis: On line 55, when the counter exceeds the cap, it is set to `cap - 1` instead of `cap`, causing the counter to be clamped one below the intended maximum.

spec.expr: cap is None or counters[key] <= cap

constraints.intent: After the clamping assignment, the counter must not exceed the cap.

spec.expr: cap is None or counters__1[key__1] == cap

constraints.intent: When the counter was clamped, it should equal exactly cap, not cap-1.
Inside the capping branch, the counter value must be set to exactly cap.
The returned counter value must never exceed the cap.
